input: 我是广东物理类，排位32000，想学计算机，最好在广州深圳，学校稳一点，不想去太贵的中外合作。
token_estimation_note: Approximate tokenizer-free estimate. Chinese chars count close to one token; non-CJK chars are estimated at four chars per token.
comparison_goal: Compare direct Excel+NL-to-LLM prompting against the methodology pipeline on token budget and verifiable success.

naive_direct_llm_full_excel.description: Send natural-language input plus full serialized Excel sheet to an LLM and ask for answer.
naive_direct_llm_full_excel.reason_not_executed: Naive full-Excel prompting is evaluated by token budget estimate, not API call.
expected_weaknesses: High risk of unsupported field inference.

naive_direct_llm_required_columns.description: Send natural-language input plus all rows for only the MVP-required columns.
naive_direct_llm_required_columns.reason_not_executed: Still lacks deterministic verifier; included only as a lower-bound direct-prompt estimate.

main_claim: For clear requirements, the symbolic pipeline spends zero or few LLM tokens on extraction, then executes exact deterministic filters with trace. Direct Excel+prompt LLM spends orders of magnitude more tokens and still cannot guarantee schema grounding or non-executable rejection.
